misc.title: The Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grands Prix will not take place in April Due to the ongoing situation in the Middle East the Grands Prix, alongside F2, F3, and F1 Academy rounds, will not take place as
misc.text: The Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grands Prix will not take place in April Due to the ongoing situation in the Middle East the Grands Prix, alongside F2, F3, and F1 Academy rounds, will not take place as scheduled While alternatives were considered, no substitutions will be made in April #F1

misc.title: Robin gave Luffy and his crew an Eternal Pose pointing to a “Nothing Island” (Nanimonai in Japanese) just before Alabasta. I’m impressed by Netflix’s playful attention to such a small detail.🎀 あれ吉【Ar
misc.text: Robin gave Luffy and his crew an Eternal Pose pointing to a “Nothing Island” (Nanimonai in Japanese) just before Alabasta. I’m impressed by Netflix’s playful attention to such a small detail.🎀 あれ吉【Are-kichi】 (@SReminal) What does “NANIMONAI” (何も無い, meaning “nothing”) on this Log Pose mean?🤔 #ONEPIECE — https://nitter.net/SReminal/status/2032785256655503459#m
